resultList.dtldesc: 4 BHK Flat for Sale in Purva Zenium 2, New International Airport Road, BangaloreExperience contemporary living in this spacious 4 BHK apartment located in the prestigious Purva Zenium 2 on New International Airport Road, Bangalore. Spread across a super built-up area of 2123 sq. ft, this ready-to-move residence is situated on the 8th floor of a well-planned 14-storey tower. The apartment enjoys an east-facing orientation, ensuring ample natural light and ventilation throughout the day. With four well-designed bedrooms, four bathrooms, two balconies, and an additional study room, the home offers a comfortable and functional layout for modern families.Property SpecificationsThis freehold property is part of a newly constructed development by Puravankara Ltd. The apartment features premium vitrified and wooden flooring, a spacious living and dining area, and thoughtfully designed interiors. The study room adds flexibility and can be used as a home office, library, or guest room. A unique advantage of this unit is the absence of common walls, offering enhanced privacy and a peaceful living environment. The apartment also comes with two covered parking spaces and can be considered for investment purposes due to its flexible layout potential.FacilitiesResidents enjoy access to a wide range of modern amenities, including a pet park, landscaped gardens, swimming pool, clubhouse, fitness facilities, childrens play areas, and recreational spaces. Essential conveniences such as 24-hour water supply, full power backup, security services, CCTV surveillance, visitor parking, service lifts, intercom facility, and RO water systems ensure a secure and comfortable lifestyle. The project is RERA approved, adding further confidence for homebuyers.LocalityStrategically located near Embassy Boulevard, the property offers excellent connectivity to Kempegowda International Airport, major IT hubs, business parks, and key areas of North Bangalore. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, shopping centres, and public transport facilities are available within 23 km, making everyday commuting and lifestyle needs highly convenient. The rapidly developing neighbourhood, coupled with strong infrastructure growth, makes this property an attractive option for both end-users and investors.This premium apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a spacious home in one of Bangalores most sought-after residential corridors, combining luxury, connectivity, and long-term value.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the peaceful residential pocket of Somanahalli, Bangalore, this spacious independent villa offers a refined living environment surrounded by greenery and low-density development. Positioned close to Edify School and a prominent Hanuman statue landmark, the property combines privacy, connectivity and long-term residential appeal.Property SpecificationsThe villa is set on a generous super built-up area of approximately 4200 sq. ft with a well-planned carpet area of around 3558 sq. ft. Developed across ground plus two floors, the home is semi-furnished and thoughtfully designed for comfortable family living. It comprises four bedrooms, four bathrooms and three balconies, with each floor offering well-proportioned private and common spaces. The living and dining areas are separated, enhancing functionality and privacy. The villa overlooks landscaped garden and park areas and benefits from excellent natural light and ventilation. Flooring includes a combination of wooden and granite finishes, lending warmth and durability to the interiors. The property is Vastu compliant and oriented towards the north-east.FacilitiesThe kitchen is modular and fitted with a chimney. The villa includes two covered car parking spaces and enjoys uninterrupted 24-hour water supply along with full power backup. Security arrangements are in place, supported by CCTV surveillance. Internal spaces are enhanced by additional rooms including a puja room, study, store and servant room, supporting both family living and household management. A childrens park within the community adds further lifestyle value.LocalitySomanahalli offers a calm residential setting while remaining well connected to key parts of Bangalore. Schools, hospitals and daily shopping facilities are available within a two kilometre radius. The area benefits from improving infrastructure and accessibility, making it suitable for families seeking a balance between tranquillity and urban convenience.Ideal Buyer ProfileThis villa is ideal for end users looking for a spacious, well-constructed independent home in a serene community, as well as for long-term investors seeking a quality residential asset with strong liveability credentials.

resultList.dtldesc: This contemporary multi-storey apartment offers a premium living experience in the burgeoning residential hub of North Bangalore. Situated within the prestigious Godrej Ananda project, this residence is designed to provide a perfect balance of modern luxury, sustainable living, and strategic connectivity for the discerning urban professional.::::Property Specifications::::This spacious 2 BHK apartment features a well-defined super area of 1,092 sq. ft, providing a comfortable and efficient living environment. Located on the 20th floor of a 24-storey tower, the unit offers stunning panoramic views of the surrounding landscapes and the city skyline. The apartment is thoughtfully designed with two bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and a private balcony that enhances natural ventilation and light. As an unfurnished resale unit in an under-construction project, it offers the flexibility for residents to customise their home to their personal preferences. The property is North-West facing, ensuring a pleasant atmosphere throughout the day, and is built to the high construction standards associated with the Godrej Properties brand.::::Facilities::::Residents of this elite project have access to a comprehensive suite of world-class facilities and amenities. The development is spread across a 20-acre land parcel with approximately 80% dedicated to open green spaces and landscaped gardens. Essential services include 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance, high-speed lifts, reliable power backup, and a consistent water supply. For recreation and wellness, the community offers a swimming pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, various sports facilities, and dedicated play areas for children. Additionally, the project includes convenient shops within the premises and ample covered parking, ensuring a self-sustained and secure lifestyle for all occupants.::::Locality::::Strategically located in Bagaluru, the property sits within the KIADB Aerospace Park, a major industrial and technology growth corridor. The neighbourhood offers exceptional connectivity to the Kempegowda International Airport and is situated adjacent to the main highway, making commuting effortless. Essential social infrastructure is within easy reach, including reputable educational institutions like the Vinayaka Public School and healthcare facilities such as the Venkateswara Poly Clinic. The area is rapidly developing into a prime residential destination, offering proximity to major IT parks and commercial centres while maintaining a serene environment away from the city's central congestion. This location provides a perfect blend of professional accessibility and residential tranquillity.
